shape.layout: Q/dO H-major producer gate; K/V contiguous selected rows
shape.kernel_owner: token-major H16 x N256, four N64 warp subtiles

read.positive: The HipKittens token-major producer compiles on MI350 with no spills and runs finite at the production B4/S4096/C4 dimensions.
read.negative: It is not a speed path: the producer/scratch gate is 13.04 ms before exact LI selected-slot gather, production dQ, dOriKV, route-aware dCmpKV, and dSinks. It is slower than the older q-chunk D512 producer gate.
read.decision: Do not promote this H-major token-owner branch. For SharedKV, HipKittens remains useful as a tile-template reference, but the next material candidate should either integrate a real selected-slot gather into the already-fast Triton schedule or use a lower-level cooperative kernel that preserves H64/N64 without H-major layout conversion.

commands.build: make -B hk_sharedkv_qm_h64n64_d512_score GPU_TARGET=CDNA4 ATTN_B=4 ATTN_Q_N=4096 ATTN_KV_N=1024 ATTN_SELECTED=512 ATTN_H=64 ATTN_H_KV=1 ATTN_NUM_WARPS=4 THUNDERKITTENS_ROOT=/workspace/sources/references/hipkittens
